form.label: Smartbus Latency and Ingest Delay
form.description: Breaks down Smartbus time spent in SQS, S3, decode, lifecycle, and indexing stages.

search.query: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" series=per_message_stats | timechart span=5m avg(queue_time_ms) as queue_ms avg(bus_time_ms) as sqs_ms avg(datastore_time_ms) as s3_ms avg(decoding_time_ms) as decode_ms avg(indexing_time_ms) as indexing_ms avg(total_time_ms) as total_ms

panel.title: P95 Total Message Time by Host

search.query: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" series=per_message_stats | bin _time span=5m | stats perc95(total_time_ms) as p95_total_ms by _time host | timechart span=5m avg(p95_total_ms) as p95_total_ms by host limit=20

panel.title: Worst Latency by Host and Queue

search.query: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" series=per_message_stats | stats count as metric_events sum(event_count) as events avg(queue_time_ms) as avg_queue_ms avg(bus_time_ms) as avg_sqs_ms avg(datastore_time_ms) as avg_s3_ms avg(decoding_time_ms) as avg_decode_ms avg(indexing_time_ms) as avg_indexing_ms avg(total_time_ms) as avg_total_ms max(total_time_ms) as max_total_ms by host queue_name | foreach avg_* max_* [ eval <<FIELD>>=round(<<FIELD>>,2) ] | fillnull value=0 events avg_queue_ms avg_sqs_ms avg_s3_ms avg_decode_ms avg_indexing_ms avg_total_ms max_total_ms | sort - max_total_ms

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus queue_name="$queue_filter$" series=per_message_stats | stats avg(total_time_ms) as avg_total_ms max(total_time_ms) as max_total_ms sum(event_count) as events by host queue_name | where avg_total_ms > 60000 OR max_total_ms > 300000 | eval avg_total_ms=round(avg_total_ms,2), max_total_ms=round(max_total_ms,2) | sort - max_total_ms
